title: VIZ Adds Evangelion Manga for Weekly Digital Releases
display_title: VIZ Adds Evangelion Manga for Weekly Digital Releases
wikitext:
[]: VIZ Adds Evangelion Manga for Weekly Digital Releases             Quote Post by Ornette » Mon Aug 15, 2011 11:20 pm http://www.evageeks.org/2011/08/viz_digital_eva_manga/ They've only for the first and second stages up. First stage is free. The online reader is kind of nice but I couldn't make the images bigger.

[]:             Quote Post by Ricky O » Mon Aug 15, 2011 11:29 pm Pretty rad!

[]:             Quote Post by gatotsu911 » Mon Aug 15, 2011 11:38 pm Seeing the words "Evangelion manga" and "weekly release" in the same sentence is, frankly, pretty mindblowing.

[]:             Quote Post by Ricky O » Tue Aug 16, 2011 2:26 am It's a good thing, too, as many of the TP aren't in print anymore. Sucks.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Aug 16, 2011 10:22 am I realize $0.99 per stage is actually cheaper than $10 per book, but doesn't that seem a bit steep? I'll bet it's to keep retailers happy.

[]:             Quote Post by Fireand'chutes77 » Tue Aug 16, 2011 10:26 am gatotsu911 wrote: Seeing the words "Evangelion manga" and "weekly release" in the same sentence is, frankly, pretty mindblowing.

[]:             Quote Post by tomrule123 » Tue Aug 23, 2011 11:37 pm I don't know if it's me that caused it, but I did send a message to Viz Manga months ago (I used an iPad to read the Manga) to see if they can get Neon Genesis Evangelion Manga. ... I hope I wasn't the only one requesting this manga. Well, either way, (read the first issue that they gave out for free. THIS WILL BE WORTH PAYING A DOLLAR PER FUTURE ISSUE.
